Potential understorey + soil evaporation

potential_understorey_evap.Rd

Proportional to energy reaching the floor: \(Eu_p = PET \times exp(-k\,LAI)\). Soil-water limitation applied in biljou_run.

Usage

potential_understorey_evap(pet, lai, k = 0.5)

Arguments

pet

Potential evapotranspiration (mm).

lai

Leaf area index.

k

Light extinction coefficient (default 0.5).

Value

Potential understorey + soil evaporation (mm).

On this page
